title: Net Tangible Assets
check: Verify that the issuer has net tangible assets of at least Rs. 3 crore in each of the preceding 3 full years.

title: Track Record of Distributable Profits
check: Verify that the company has a track record of distributable profits for at least two out of immediately preceding three financial years.

title: Post Issue Paid-up Capital
check: Verify that the post-issue paid-up capital of the company does not exceed Rs. 25 crore.

title: Restated Financial Statements
check: Ensure financial statements are restated for the last three years and are no older than six months from the issue opening date.

title: Outstanding Litigations
check: Verify disclosure of all outstanding litigations involving the issuer, promoters, and directors.

title: Minimum Promoters' Contribution
check: Ensure promoters' contribution is not less than 20% of the post-issue capital.

title: Lock-In Period for Promoters' Contribution
check: Verify that minimum promoters' contribution is locked in for a period of three years from the date of allotment.

title: Lock-In Period for Other Pre-Issue Capital
check: Ensure all pre-issue share capital, other than promoters' contribution, is locked in for one year from date of allotment.

title: Risk Factors
check: Verify that risk factors are materially clear and prominently disclosed, including business risks and regulatory risks.

title: Objects of the Issue
check: Ensure detailed disclosure of the objects of the issue, project cost, and means of finance.

title: Basis for Issue Price
check: Verify that qualitative and quantitative factors justifying the issue price are disclosed.

title: Board Composition
check: Verify compliance with LODR regulations regarding the number of independent and women directors.

title: Key Managerial Personnel
check: Ensure detailed profiles of Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) and their compensation are disclosed.

title: Lead Manager Registration
check: Verify that the lead manager holds a valid SEBI registration.

title: Underwriting Agreement
check: Ensure the issue is 100% underwritten, with at least 15% underwritten by the Lead Manager on its own accounts.

title: History of Share Capital
check: Verify that the history of share capital built up over time is fully documented.

title: Outstanding Warrants or Rights
check: Check for proper disclosure of any outstanding warrants, options, or rights to convert debt into equity.

title: Minimum Application Value
check: Verify that the minimum application size for SME IPO is Rs. 1,00,000.

title: Market Making Requirement
check: Ensure there is a market making agreement for at least three years from the date of listing.

title: Number of Prospective Allottees
check: Verify that the minimum number of allottees is not less than 50.
